case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. SARA NESS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NESS, SARA $8,500.44 PRINCIPAL, $712.61 INTEREST, $262.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,475.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
